nasb.text: “Now after a long time the master of those slaves *came and *settled accounts with them.

esv.text: Now after a long time the master of those servants came and settled accounts with them.

cnv.text: 過了很久，那些僕人的主人回來了，要和他們算帳。

ccb.text: 过了很久，这些奴仆的主人回来了，要跟他们结帐。

csbs.text: “过了很久，那些奴仆的主人回来，与他们清算账目。
